description: Explicit UI contract for the Sovereign portal /topology route.

header.title: Topology
header.subtitle: Inter-resource dependencies — agents calling MCP servers, tools and external models.

topology_card.comment: Same component as the dashboard's TopologyCard — full-width on this route.

non_negotiables: TopologyCard renders FULL-WIDTH (NOT inside a 2fr/1fr split) — it's the only widget at the top of this route.
DataTable column order is fixed: Source → Edge → Target.
Edge column uses a p-tag chip; the kind values are 'mcp', 'tool', 'model-call'.
Source and Target column tones differ (Source is strong; Target is mono-val) to mirror admin's audit table.
Subtitle uses an em dash (U+2014) between 'dependencies' and the description.
